SEARCH
Package net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock

Interface StockHolder

All Known Subinterfaces:
UserStockHolder
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStockHolder
public interface StockHolder
An interface that holds stock.

The implementation of this interface must be thread-safe.

    • getAmount

      int getAmount(@NotNull @NotNull BoxItem item)
      Gets the stock quantity of the specified item.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to get the stock
      Returns:
      the current stock quantity

    • setAmount

      @NonExtendable @Deprecated(since="5.5.0", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") default void setAmount(@NotNull @NotNull BoxItem item, int amount)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use setAmount(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
      Sets the stock quantity of the specified item.

      This method calls setAmount(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause) with StockEvent.Cause.API.

      Parameters:
      item - the item to set the stock quantity
      amount - the amount

    • setAmount

      default void setAmount(@NotNull @NotNull BoxItem item, int amount, @NotNull StockEvent.Cause cause)
      Sets the stock quantity of the specified item.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to set the stock quantity
      amount - the amount
      cause - the cause that indicates why this method called

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.0", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") default int increase(@NotNull @NotNull BoxItem item)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use increase(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
      Increases the stock of the specified item by one.

      This method calls increase(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause) with StockEvent.Cause.API.

      item - the item to increase the stock
      Returns:
      the stock quantity after increasing
